metadata.description: Selamy Labs public, generic MCP servers distributed as a versioned Claude Code plugin. Workloads add this marketplace and enable the plugin, pinned by tag/SHA, instead of copying server configs around.

plugins.name: agent-mcp
plugins.description: Selamy Labs public MCP servers, aggregated for one-step discovery + pinned install: laneq (priority queue), reddit (terms-aware Reddit research), dispatch (allowlisted lane dispatch), memory (markdown-memory store), telemetry (read-only metrics backend), telemetry-emit (at-will OTel emission), dns (record CRUD). Each server lives in its own versioned repo.
